en: An expression used to tell someone to hurry up or move quickly.
en_example: Move it, move it, move it, move it.
zh_example: 快動起來，快動起來，快動起來，快動起來。

en: Approaching from behind someone or something.
To begin or commence an action or event.
en_example: I'm going to start off with a bunny hole!
ja_example: ウサギの穴から始めるよ！

en: A small hole or burrow made by a rabbit.
en_example: The rabbit disappeared into its bunny hole.
zh_example: 兔子消失進了牠的兔子洞。
ja_example: ウサギは自分のウサギの穴に消えた。

en: To move as a group or in unison.
A person or thing likely to cause damage or danger.
en_example: You got to threat to a man!
ja_example: 男に脅威を与えなきゃ！
